overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy landscape transitioning from a rocky coastline through dense forest to snowy mountain terrain. The atmosphere is dark and moody with overcast skies and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with shipwreck debris

events.description: moving from rocky coastline into forested area, leaving the shipwreck behind

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the rocky shoreline away from the water, heading toward the tree line

entered.detail: broken wooden ship remains scattered on the rocky shore
dark jagged rocks covering the shoreline ground
dark choppy water visible beyond the shore
dense pine trees marking the start of the forest

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy rocky coastline with shipwreck debris scattered on the left. Geralt walks forward over dark jagged rocks, moving away from the ocean water toward the tree line where the coniferous forest begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path surrounded by tall coniferous trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming dense wall on the left side of the path
tall pine trees forming dense wall on the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
bushes and ferns lining the path edges

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dense coniferous forest, walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees. The canopy blocks much of the stormy sky, creating an enclosed feeling as the coastal rocks and shipwreck disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest valley opening with distant snow-capped mountain views

events.description: forest opens into wide valley with first clear view of snow-capped mountains in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the forest clearing with snow-capped mountains now visible ahead in the valley

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks covered in snow visible through the clearing
open grassy area in the forest with scattered trees
green grass covering the valley floor between forest sections

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide valley clearing, revealing snow-capped mountains in the distance. The dense trees recede to the sides as Geralt walks through grassy terrain, with the mountain range becoming the dominant feature on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with rocky terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt to snow-covered rocky terrain as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: climbing up the snowy mountain path, navigating rocky outcrops in the higher elevation

entered.detail: white snow covering the mountain path and ground
large rocks and boulders scattered across the snowy slope
inclined snowy terrain leading upward into the mountains

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends into the snowy mountains, the ground now covered in white snow and rocky outcrops. The forest and grass give way to alpine terrain as the camera climbs higher, bringing the snow-capped peaks closer into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a stormy, debris-strewn coastline into a frozen alpine wilderness. It begins with Geralt navigating dark jagged rocks and shipwreck debris, moving away from the ocean toward the edge of a coniferous forest. As he enters the woods, the scene shifts into an enclosed environment of tall pine trees and narrow dirt trails that obscure the stormy sky. The forest then opens into a wide valley clearing where the dense canopy recedes to reveal a distant range of snow-capped mountains. Finally, the grassy terrain gives way to white snow and rocky outcrops as the camera ascends higher into the alpine peaks.
